runtime_assertions.name: Module still installs cleanly after changes
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush cr && ddev drush pm:list --status=enabled 2>&1 | grep -q group_ai_pm && echo PASS || echo FAIL
runtime_assertions.rationale: Baseline sanity — any PHP syntax error or broken service definition prevents module from loading

runtime_assertions.name: DELETE route is registered
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$provider = \Drupal::service('router.route_provider'); $all = $provider->getAllRoutes(); $found = FALSE; foreach ($all as $name => $route) { if (strpos($name, 'group_ai_pm') !== FALSE && in_array('DELETE', $route->getMethods())) { $found = TRUE; break; } } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Verifies a DELETE method route was registered for the module

runtime_assertions.name: DELETE route has CSRF header requirement
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$provider = \Drupal::service('router.route_provider'); $all = $provider->getAllRoutes(); $found = FALSE; foreach ($all as $name => $route) { if (strpos($name, 'group_ai_pm') !== FALSE && in_array('DELETE', $route->getMethods())) { $reqs = $route->getRequirements(); if (isset($reqs['_csrf_request_header_token'])) { $found = TRUE; break; } } } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: DELETE route must use _csrf_request_header_token (header-based) for JavaScript CSRF protection

runtime_assertions.name: DELETE route has _format:json requirement
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$provider = \Drupal::service('router.route_provider'); $all = $provider->getAllRoutes(); $found = FALSE; foreach ($all as $name => $route) { if (strpos($name, 'group_ai_pm') !== FALSE && in_array('DELETE', $route->getMethods())) { $reqs = $route->getRequirements(); if (isset($reqs['_format']) && $reqs['_format'] === 'json') { $found = TRUE; break; } } } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: DELETE route needs _format:json for JSON error responses instead of HTML

runtime_assertions.name: DELETE route has _admin_route option
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$provider = \Drupal::service('router.route_provider'); $all = $provider->getAllRoutes(); $found = FALSE; foreach ($all as $name => $route) { if (strpos($name, 'group_ai_pm') !== FALSE && in_array('DELETE', $route->getMethods())) { if ($route->getOption('_admin_route')) { $found = TRUE; break; } } } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: DELETE route must use admin theme for consistent admin UI

runtime_assertions.name: DELETE route has entity upcasting for task parameter
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$provider = \Drupal::service('router.route_provider'); $all = $provider->getAllRoutes(); $found = FALSE; foreach ($all as $name => $route) { if (strpos($name, 'group_ai_pm') !== FALSE && in_array('DELETE', $route->getMethods())) { $params = $route->getOption('parameters') ?: []; foreach ($params as $param => $config) { if (isset($config['type']) && strpos($config['type'], 'entity:') === 0) { $found = TRUE; break 2; } } } } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: DELETE route must have entity upcasting so the controller receives a loaded entity object

runtime_assertions.name: TaskApiController has deleteTask method
runtime_assertions.rationale: Controller must have the deleteTask method for the DELETE endpoint

runtime_assertions.name: Project entity can still be created
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$project = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('project')->create(['title' => 'Test Project P19', 'status' => 'active']); $project->save(); echo $project->id() ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Baseline sanity — entity creation still works after module changes

runtime_assertions.name: Task entity can still be created with project reference
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$projects = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('project')->loadMultiple(); $pid = array_key_first($projects); $task = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('task')->create(['title' => 'Test Task P19', 'status' => 'todo', 'priority' => 'medium', 'project' => $pid]); $task->save(); echo $task->id() ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Baseline sanity — task creation with project reference still works

runtime_assertions.name: Kanban library still has core/once dependency
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$lib = \Drupal::service('library.discovery')->getLibraryByName('group_ai_pm', 'kanban'); $deps = $lib['dependencies'] ?? []; $found = FALSE; foreach ($deps as $dep) { if (strpos($dep, 'once') !== FALSE) { $found = TRUE; break; } } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Kanban library must still depend on core/once for the Drupal.behaviors bridge

runtime_assertions.name: Vite build produced dist files
runtime_assertions.command: test -f /tmp/phase19-VARIANT/web/modules/custom/group_ai_pm/js/dist/kanban.js && test -s /tmp/phase19-VARIANT/web/modules/custom/group_ai_pm/js/dist/kanban.js && echo PASS || echo FAIL
runtime_assertions.rationale: Vite build must succeed and produce a non-empty bundle file

runtime_assertions.name: deleteKanban function exists in API wrapper
runtime_assertions.rationale: API wrapper must have a delete function for the DELETE endpoint

runtime_assertions.name: useToast composable exists
runtime_assertions.rationale: Toast notification composable must be created

runtime_assertions.name: useFilters composable exists
runtime_assertions.rationale: Filter state composable must be created

runtime_assertions.name: DashboardController content() executes without exception
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$project = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('project')->create(['title' => 'P19 Render Test', 'status' => 'active']); $project->save(); $task = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('task')->create(['title' => 'P19 Task', 'status' => 'todo', 'priority' => 'medium', 'project' => $project->id()]); $task->save(); $controller = \Drupal::classResolver()->getInstanceFromDefinition('\\Drupal\\group_ai_pm\\Controller\\DashboardController'); try { $result = $controller->content(); echo is_array($result) ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL'; } catch (\Exception $e) { echo 'FAIL: ' . $e->getMessage(); }"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Executes the dashboard controller to catch runtime errors — regression check after phase 19 modifications

runtime_assertions.name: KanbanController board() executes without exception
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$project = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('project')->create(['title' => 'P19 Board Test', 'status' => 'active']); $project->save(); $controller = \Drupal::classResolver()->getInstanceFromDefinition('\\Drupal\\group_ai_pm\\Controller\\KanbanController'); try { $result = $controller->board($project); echo is_array($result) ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL'; } catch (\Exception $e) { echo 'FAIL: ' . $e->getMessage(); }"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Executes the board controller to catch runtime errors — regression check after phase 19 modifications
